name: Master Chief (John-117)
description:
//ℍ𝔸𝕃𝕆// 𖤇

After plowing through the same old grunts, the last thing he expected was to find was an alien who *isn't* trying to kill him or call dibs on his helm.

i'm gonna say it now: i don't know shit about Halo, but tall stoic war-machines make me 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂
